semantic.role: Engine module responsible for reading, validating, and aggregating spine index documents (folder units, project units) from the .spine/index directory into a unified in-memory structure for downstream analysis and transformation.
responsibilities: Load and parse all spine index documents (folder units and project units) from the filesystem under the .spine/index directory.
Validate index documents for compatibility with the current schema using isCompatibleIndexDocument.
Aggregate individual folder units and project units into a combined representation that preserves hierarchy and provenance.
Report read issues (e.g., invalid or incompatible index files) via reportIndexReadIssueOnce.
Provide a central access point for other engine modules to retrieve the aggregated spine index for further processing.
outOfScope: Writing or modifying index documents on disk (read-only operation).
Direct filesystem management — delegated to FileSystemManager.
invariants: Must not import any CLI entrypoint modules or service orchestrators (engine-independence rule).
All index documents must be checked for schema compatibility before inclusion in the aggregate.
The aggregated structure must preserve the original folder hierarchy and provenance metadata.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a reusable engine that reads and aggregates spine index documents from the filesystem, serving as the data foundation for analysis and transformation pipelines while maintaining decoupling from presentation and orchestration layers.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: This file was part of a bulk sync and release gate fix pass; no specific functional change is indicated by the commit message alone.

publicSurface.description: Primary class for reading and merging spine index documents from the .spine/index directory. Provides methods to load folder units and project units, validate compatibility, and aggregate them into a unified data structure. Consumed by other engine modules and services that need the aggregated index.
